India Sourcing Price Guide

✅

Complete Wedding Outfit Checklist

Every outfit needed across all 4 ceremonies — bride, bridesmaids, family, groom. Never miss a thing.

📅

NRI Wedding Planning Timeline

Month-by-month countdown — exactly when to order what so nothing arrives late.

🚩

Vendor Red Flags Guide

10 signs an Indian wedding vendor is a scam. Protect yourself before you pay a single rupee.

We respect your privacy. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.

Frequently asked questions

Are the guides really free?

Yes, completely free. We ask for your email so we can send you the download link and occasional wedding planning tips. You can unsubscribe anytime.

Who are these guides for?

NRI brides and families in the US who are planning an Indian wedding and want to source outfits, jewelry, or ceremony items from India. Whether you're just starting to research or actively shopping, there's a guide for your stage.

Will I be signed up for marketing emails?

You'll receive a few helpful wedding planning emails after downloading. Every email has a one-click unsubscribe link. We never share your email with third parties.

Ready to start sourcing?

Get expert help sourcing your Indian wedding outfits directly from India.

Book a Free Consultation →
